name: Albert Bailey CROSBY, Petitioner v. COMMON PLEAS COURT OF FIRST JUDICIAL DISTRICT PHILADELPHIA, Respondent
name_abbreviation: Crosby v. Common Pleas Court of First Judicial District Philadelphia

parties: Albert Bailey CROSBY, Petitioner v. COMMON PLEAS COURT OF FIRST JUDICIAL DISTRICT PHILADELPHIA, Respondent.

opinions.text:
ORDER
PER CURIAM.
AND NOW, this 4th day of October, 2010, the Application for Leave to File Original Process is GRANTED, and the Petition for Writ of Habeas Corpus is DENIED.
opinions.author: PER CURIAM.

casebody.head_matter:
Albert Bailey CROSBY, Petitioner v. COMMON PLEAS COURT OF FIRST JUDICIAL DISTRICT PHILADELPHIA, Respondent.
No. 87 EM 2010.
Supreme Court of Pennsylvania.
Oct. 4, 2010.
